comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: Operational provisioning COMPLETED 2026-07-10 ~17:50-18:00 UTC (AWS root session + JoeOakhartNava where needed) — verification of artifact emission in flight. Details: (1) SSM slot /rebar/prod/reviewbot-tickets-pat ALREADY held a real classic PAT (ghp_, 40 chars) — validated against GitHub: push=true on navapbc/rebar. NOTE it is a broad classic repo-scope token, not the fine-grained contents:write-only PAT the design specified — least-privilege swap recommended (only a human can mint that). (2) terraform: imported the 5 pre-existing SSM params into state (ssm.tf has ignore_changes=[value], so import is the correct reconciliation — terraform no longer plans to re-create them); applied tag updates. (3) Re-ran fetch-secrets.sh (ENV_FILE=/opt/rebar/infra/compose/.env): .env now carries REVIEWBOT_TICKETS_PAT. (4) Restarted review-bot; entrypoint materialized the persistent tickets worktree (295M clone onto the gerrit_reviewbot_tickets volume) and /review/health is 200. (5) Forced a re-review of merged change 492 via /rerun (202 accepted) to prove artifact write+push. AC2 (env delivery on deploy without manual boot — autodeploy re-runs fetch-secrets before compose up) remains the code portion of this ticket.

comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: END-TO-END PROOF COMPLETE (2026-07-10 21:04 UTC): forced re-review of merged change 492 emitted the first REAL production code_review artifact — ticket 8e68-601a-b32d-4302 (type code_review, title 'code-review: rebar~492 @ 40e42c962...', Decision PASS, change_fingerprint recorded), auto-linked relates_to e7f4 via the commit's rebar-ticket trailer, committed to the persistent worktree and auto-pushed to origin/tickets. Getting here required fixing a deeper defect than the missing PAT: a fresh entrypoint clone of the tickets branch is WRITE-DEAD (.env-id is gitignored -> 'ticket system not initialized'; container has no git identity -> commit fails), and emit_code_review_artifact swallows both silently — filed as bug d220-eeda-1909-4147 (discovered_from this ticket). Prod's persistent volume is now converged (ran rebar._store.ensures.run_ensures + set repo-local git identity RebarBotNava/joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com — both persist on the gerrit_reviewbot_tickets volume across restarts), but any fresh volume regresses until d220's entrypoint fix lands. AC1 is MET in prod. Remaining on this ticket: AC2 (autodeploy re-runs fetch-secrets before compose up so new env keys reach the box without a manual boot) — code work. Also recommended: swap the broad classic repo-scope PAT for a fine-grained contents:write-only token (human-mintable only).

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Incident 2731's trigger commit (10837ca88) shipped the code_review artifact feature, but it was inert in prod: the box's .env had no REVIEWBOT_TICKETS_* vars. autodeploy.sh rsync-excludes infra/compose/.env (line 88) and never re-runs fetch-secrets.sh, so NO newly-added SSM-backed env key can reach the box on deploy without a manual boot — a half-updated-deploy-path defect.

## Status
AC1 (artifacts emitted from prod reviews) is DONE and proven in prod (see comments: SSM slot populated, terraform state reconciled, fetch-secrets re-run by hand, end-to-end artifact 8e68 emitted on change 492, 2026-07-10). The SSM/terraform work was OPERATIONAL and is already complete; note the slot /rebar/prod/reviewbot-tickets-pat already exists in infra/terraform/ssm.tf (rebar_secret_params, ~line 49) with lifecycle{ignore_changes=[value]}, so 'terraform apply' is a NO-OP for its value — the operative provisioning step was 'aws ssm put-parameter --overwrite --name /rebar/prod/reviewbot-tickets-pat --type SecureString --value <PAT>', NOT terraform. This is recorded for accuracy; no terraform/SSM work remains.

## Remaining work (AC2 — the only code change)
Make autodeploy re-run fetch-secrets.sh before 'docker compose up' so new/rotated SSM-backed env keys reach the review-bot container on deploy without a manual boot.

Precise design (in infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh):
- Add a dedicated trigger SECRETS_PATHS='infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh infra/terraform/ssm.tf'. Rationale: a new env key requires editing fetch-secrets.sh (to emit the leaf) and/or ssm.tf (to declare the param); NEITHER is in BOT_PATHS, so keying the refresh only off BOT_PATHS would miss exactly the env-only-change scenario AC2 names. (Pure SSM VALUE rotation with no git change is out of scope: main does not advance, so autodeploy no-ops — that path is operator-triggered, not deploy-triggered.)
- Guard the existing review-bot redeploy block on: changed BOT_PATHS OR changed SECRETS_PATHS (so a secrets-only change still recreates the container to pick up the new .env).
- Placement: AFTER the rsync+chown (so $DEPLOY_REPO holds the TARGET fetch-secrets.sh) and BEFORE the ':prev' tag / 'docker compose build && up'. Invoke ENV_FILE="$COMPOSE_DIR/.env" bash "$DEPLOY_REPO/infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh"; then re-assert the preserved .env owner.
- Error contract (preserves autodeploy's fail-safe, never-half-updated guarantee): fetch-secrets is fail-fast — on any SSM error it exits 1 WITHOUT touching .env. On that failure, emit an err 'secrets-fetch-failed' marker, record_backoff_failure, and exit 1 — abort the deploy BEFORE tagging :prev or building, so the running bot stays on its current image (:latest untouched, nothing to roll back). Never build/up against a stale or half-written secrets file. Runs only on an actual bot/secrets redeploy (not every 2-min tick), so no SSM quota regression.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] code_review artifacts are written + pushed from prod reviews (no 'emission failed' warnings). [DONE in prod — change 492 / artifact 8e68]
- [ ] autodeploy.sh re-runs fetch-secrets.sh before 'docker compose up' on a BOT_PATHS OR SECRETS_PATHS change; a new SSM-backed env key reaches the box on deploy without a manual boot.
- [ ] On fetch-secrets failure the deploy aborts fail-safe (err marker + backoff, .env intact, running bot untouched, no rollback needed).
- [ ] Tests cover: (a) fetch-secrets runs before compose up on a secrets-only change; (b) fetch-secrets failure aborts the deploy without building.
- [ ] File paths: infra/scripts/autodeploy.sh (the code change); infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh, infra/terraform/ssm.tf (referenced/triggering, unchanged).

## Out of scope / follow-ups
- Least-privilege PAT swap (broad classic repo-scope -> fine-grained contents:write only): human-mintable only; recommended, tracked separately.
- Bug d220 (entrypoint clone write-dead on a FRESH volume): separate ticket; prod volume already converged.
compiled_state.title: activate the reviewbot durable-tickets feature: SSM PAT + terraform apply + fetch-secrets rerun; fix .env delivery gap in autodeploy
